fire_rating.ul_design: UL X772 (or equivalent column SFRM assembly)

components.name: HSS Column (Hollow Structural Section)
components.material: ASTM A500 Grade B/C Structural Steel
components.description: Hollow structural section column — square, rectangular, or round tube profile. Exposed surfaces receive direct SFRM application.

properties.hp_a_note: HSS columns have lower Hp/A (W/D) ratios than wide flange; typically require thicker SFRM

components.name: SFRM Coating — Direct Application
components.description: Spray-applied fireproofing directly to all exposed faces of the HSS tube. Uniform thickness required around entire perimeter.

properties.application_method: Spray applied in multiple passes to build thickness
properties.surface_profile: Rough texture acceptable; smooth troweled finish available

components.name: Corner Build-Up
components.description: Additional SFRM material built up at corner radii of square/rectangular HSS to achieve required thickness. Corners are vulnerable to damage and thickness reduction.

properties.corner_radius_note: HSS corners have tight radii — SFRM tends to thin at corners
properties.reinforcement: Expanded metal lath or welded wire mesh wrap at corners if thickness cannot be maintained by spray alone
properties.min_thickness_at_corner: Must meet or exceed specified thickness at all points including corners

assembly_constraints.description: Minimum SFRM thickness for HSS column per UL listing W/D ratio. HSS sections have lower W/D than WF, requiring thicker SFRM.
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM thickness per UL listing. Verify W/D for specific HSS size — do not use WF tables.

assembly_constraints.description: SFRM thickness at HSS corners must be verified separately — corners are the thinnest point
assembly_constraints.rule: Thickness gauge readings required at flat faces AND at corners. Both must meet minimum.

assembly_constraints.description: Round HSS sections have uniform curvature — SFRM application is more uniform but adhesion can be challenging
assembly_constraints.rule: For round HSS, use Hp/A formula for circular sections. Surface must be clean and free of mill scale.

assembly_constraints.description: Columns in traffic areas require impact-resistant SFRM or protective jacket
assembly_constraints.rule: Below 8 ft AFF in traffic areas: use medium-density SFRM or install protective corner guards / jackets
